title: lomanthus bangii
intro: Lomanthus bangii, also known as the Bangii lomanthus or yellow lomanthus, is a flowering plant species belonging to the family Asteraceae. Native to the tropical regions of Central and South America, this plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Lomanthus bangii include its ability to reduce fever, alleviate digestive issues, and support immune function, making it a popular herbal remedy in traditional medicine. Lomanthus bangii can be prepared as a tea, infusion, or tincture, and its extracts are also used in modern herbal medicine formulations.
